title: ICAI CA Intermediate May 2026 Exam Results Declared!
content:
# ICAI CA Intermediate May 2026 Exam Results Declared!

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne Chartered Accountants Intermediate Examination, May 2026 ke results announce kiye hain.

*   **Result Declaration Date:** The results for the Chartered Accountants Intermediate Examination held in May 2026 were declared on June 24, 2026.
*   **Where to Check:** Candidates can access their scorecards by visiting the official ICAI result portal.
*   **Required Details:** To view the results, students will need their roll number and registration number.

## Read the Official Document
* [Check Your CA Intermediate May 2026 Results Here](https://caresults.icai.org)

*Published on: 25 June 2026*
